docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-08-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-08-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
JUDGMENT ASSIGNED BY JUDGMENT CREDITOR HUNG, NGUYEN ASSIGNED TO COLLECTRIX LLC
PROOF OF SERVICE OF SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES TO JUDGMENT DEBTOR FILED BY ASSIGNEE COLLECTRIX LLC SERVED NOV-15-2025, MAIL AS TO DEFENDANT RUSSO, DOMINIC
APPLICATION FOR RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY ASSIGNEE COLLECTRIX LLC AS TO DEFENDANT RUSSO, DOMINIC NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT ISSUED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HUNG, NGUYEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RUSSO, DOMINIC $7,130.00 PRINCIPAL, $7,755.38 INTEREST, $1,044.37 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $15,929.75, FEE FOR FILING RENEWAL APPLICATION ADDED TO COSTS
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $601.68 ACCRUED INTEREST, $678.00 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT RUSSO, DOMINIC
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $614.25 ACCRUED INTEREST, $500.00 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT RUSSO, DOMINIC
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-08-2015 - JUDGMENT.
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $4,861.13 ACCRUED INTEREST, $999.37 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT RUSSO, DOMINIC
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $55.00 SERVED AUG-18-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT RUSSO, DOMINIC
PROOF OF SERVICE OF JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S STATEMENT OF ASSETS (SC-133) DEMAND TO PAY JUDGMENT LETTER FILED BY ASSIGNEE COLLECTRIX LLC SERVED JUL-19-2016, MAIL AS TO DEFENDANT RUSSO, DOMINIC

PROOF OF SERVICE ON APPLICATION AND NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY ASSIGNEE COLLECTRIX LLC SERVED SEP-22-2025, MAIL AS TO DEFENDANT RUSSO, DOMINIC PROCESS COMPLETED BY DEFAULT SECTION. WRIT MAY ISSUE ON DEC-01-2025 IF NO MOTION FILED BY DEFENDANT
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY HUNG, NGUYEN AS TO DEFENDANT RUSSO, DOMINIC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-08-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HUNG, NGUYEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RUSSO, DOMINIC $7,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $130.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,130.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $263.25 ACCRUED INTEREST, $250.00 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT RUSSO, DOMINIC
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $7,755.38 ACCRUED INTEREST, $999.37 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT RUSSO, DOMINIC
